questions.question:
An init container diagnostics brief is incomplete and contains stale or unsafe remediation guidance.

A ConfigMap named `init-diagnostics-brief` already exists in namespace `init-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetDeployment` is `report-api`
- `deploymentInventory` is `kubectl get deployment report-api -n init-lab -o wide`
- `initContainerInventory` is `kubectl get deployment report-api -n init-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.initContainers[*].name}'`
- `initCommandCheck` is `kubectl get deployment report-api -n init-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].command}'`
- `sharedVolumeCheck` is `kubectl get deployment report-api -n init-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.volumes[0].name}'`
- `initMountCheck` is `kubectl get deployment report-api -n init-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.initContainers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `appMountCheck` is `kubectl get deployment report-api -n init-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].volumeMounts[0].mountPath}'`
- `eventCheck` is `kubectl get events -n init-lab --sort-by=.lastTimestamp`
- `safeManifestNote` is `confirm init container command, shared volume name, and mount paths before changing the Deployment manifest`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q1/init-diagnostics-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text checklist to `/tmp/exam/q1/init-diagnostics-checklist.txt` with the sections `Deployment Inventory`, `Init Container Checks`, and `Safe Manifest Review`

Do not restart the Deployment, do not delete pods, and do not patch the live init container command during this drill.

verification.description: The init diagnostics brief ConfigMap uses the intended workload target, init container inspection commands, event check, and safe manifest guidance
The exported checklist contains the required sections and exact deployment inventory, init container checks, and safe manifest review commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and stale unsafe init container remediation guidance is removed
